code:
sequenceDiagram
    autonumber
    participant Upstream
    participant agent-client-relationships
    participant Database
    participant agent-assurance
    participant des

    Upstream->>+agent-client-relationships: POST /api/:arn/invitation
    agent-client-relationships->>Database: Read: Check for pending invitations.
    agent-client-relationships->>+agent-assurance: GET /agent-assurance/agent-details/:arn
    agent-assurance-->>-agent-client-relationships: Response
    agent-client-relationships->>+des: GET /registration/business-details/... or /vat/customer/vrn/...
    des-->>-agent-client-relationships: Response
    agent-client-relationships->>Database: Read: Check for active relationship.
    agent-client-relationships->>Database: Read: Check for partial-auth relationship (FinTech_PaymentGateway).
    agent-client-relationships->>Database: Create: Create new invitation.
    agent-client-relationships-->>-Upstream: Final Response

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个代理邀请流程的时序图。上游系统Upstream会向我们agent-client-relationships服务发起邀请请求，然后我们要做一系列校验，包括查库、调agent-assurance拿代理详情、调des获取商户信息，最后创建邀请记录。
明白了。Upstream到agent-client-relationships是POST请求对吧？路径是/api/:arn/invitation？然后agent-client-relationships会先读Database检查pending invitations？
对的，第一步就是POST。然后查库看有没有待处理的邀请，避免重复。接着要异步调agent-assurance的GET /agent-details/:arn拿代理信息。
好，我把agent-assurance加上去了，用虚线返回Response。接下来是不是还要调des？我看有两个可能的端点，/registration/business-details和/vat/customer/vrn？
是的，des返回之后，我们还要两次读Database：一次查active relationship，一次查partial-auth relationship。这里要注意partial-auth是跟FinTech_PaymentGateway这个业务场景相关的。
两次读库都是Read操作对吧？然后最后一步是Create new invitation，再返回Final Response给Upstream？
没错。对了，记得加上autonumber，步骤比较多，编号清晰一点。还有几个调用是异步的，agent-assurance和des那里要用激活框表示。
完成了。Upstream到agent-client-relationships用了+号开激活框，agent-client-relationships调agent-assurance和des也都开了激活框，des返回后关闭。所有步骤加了autonumber，Database的三次读和一次Create都标清楚了。
